PassThroughGate.description: Drives through the midpoint between one green and one red tower or buoy pair. Use for gate and towergate tasks. Input both objects. Do NOT use for speedgate.

SearchPattern.description: Executes a spiral or lawnmower search pattern centered on the given (x, y) coordinate. Use this when a required object is marked [estimated] from the world model. After SearchPattern completes, assume the object has been found and confirmed. Do NOT use this if the object is already marked [detected].

DriveSpeedgate.description: Executes the full speedgate sequence atomically. Use ONLY for speedgate tasks. REQUIRES: green buoy, red buoy, beacon, and yellow buoy.

ShootWater.description: Shoots a stream of water for 10 seconds
